productDisplayName: Gliders Men Black Davis Sports Sandals
description: A pair of open-toed black sports sandals with red and grey accents, has Velcro closuresSynthetic upper with stitched detail and overlays, has a forefoot strap secured with a Velcro closure, connected to an ankle loop that has a pull-loop detail by a vertical strap on one side, secured with a Velcro closureCushioned footbed with perforations and branding on the heel regionTextured outsole with patterned grooves and brandingWarranty: 3 months
